headline: Verizon (VZ) Launches Gizmo Watch 4 For Families Focused On Child Safety
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has launched the Gizmo Watch 4, a new connected device aimed at children and families. The watch introduces features such as Watch Removal Detection, real-time location insights, severe weather alerts, and tighter integration with the Verizon Family app. This release expands Verizon’s family-focused device lineup and is being supported by a broad promotional push across its consumer channels. For investors tracking Verizon Communications, the Gizmo Watch 4...

headline: Prediction: After a Record Quarter, Here’s Where AT&T Will End The Year
summary: AT&T just posted its fifth straight earnings beat while accelerating buybacks to $10 billion, but the stock still sits nearly 20% below its 52-week high. Whether that gap closes depends on two risks that bulls keep brushing aside.

headline: AT&T CEO Dismisses the Starlink Threat: “They’re Coming to the Game Very Late”
summary: AT&T just posted its fifth straight earnings beat while adding over a million new accounts, yet its stock sits near a multiyear low as Starlink looms. CEO John Stankey says satellite competitors are decades too late to matter, but Wall Street analysts are not so sure.
